name: Small Multiples Grid
description: Clean editorial small-multiples grid showing multiple related charts with consistent axes and restrained palette.
template:
Create a clean editorial data visualization poster showing {prompt}

Style requirements:
- White background, generous margins
- Restrained palette: navy, rust, sky blue, olive, charcoal
- Small-multiples grid with consistent axes across panels
- Ultra-legible labels and crisp typography
- Publication-grade chart rendering
- Scientifically clear and visually elegant

Density control:
- 8-16 mini-panels in grid layout
- Each panel has identical structure for easy comparison
- Aligned scales and consistent spacing
- Clean hierarchy with title block and subtitle
